name: Elizacloud
description: elizaOS plugin to connect with elizaOS Cloud services

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_API_KEY.label: Cloud Api Key
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to ElizaOS Cloud API (format: eliza_xxxxx). Get it from https://www.elizacloud.ai/dashboard/api-keys

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BASE_URL.label: Cloud Base Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for all ElizaOS Cloud API requests.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_SMALL_MODEL.label: Cloud Small Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_SMALL_MODEL.help: Small/fast model for quick tasks (overrides SMALL_MODEL). Default: gemma-4-31b

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the small language model if ELIZAOS_CLOUD_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_LARGE_MODEL.label: Cloud Large Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_LARGE_MODEL.help: Large/powerful model for complex tasks (overrides LARGE_MODEL). Default: gemma-4-31b

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the large language model if ELIZAOS_CLOUD_LARGE_MODEL is not set.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Cloud Embedding Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model to use for generating text embeddings.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Cloud Embedding Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Custom base URL for the ElizaOS Cloud embeddings endpoint.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.label: Cloud Embedding Api Key
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.help: Custom API key for the ElizaOS Cloud embeddings endpoint.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Cloud Embedding Dimensions
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for the returned embedding vectors.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.label: Cloud Image Description Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for describing images.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKE.label: Cloud Image Description Max Tokens
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKE.help: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the image-description model response.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_MODEL.label: Cloud Tts Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for text-to-speech generation.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_VOICE.label: Cloud Tts Voice
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_VOICE.help: Voice profile to use for text-to-speech output.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.label: Cloud Tts Instructions
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.help: Optional instructions to control the style or behavior of the text-to-speech request.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Cloud Experimental Telemetry
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Cloud Browser Base Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for ElizaOS Cloud requests (no secrets in the client).

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Cloud Browser Embedding Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for ElizaOS Cloud embeddings.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_ENABLED.label: Cloud Enabled
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_ENABLED.help: Enable ElizaCloud container provisioning, device auth, bridge, and backup services. When false, only inference model handlers are active.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_APP_VERSION.label: Cloud App Version
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_APP_VERSION.help: Application version sent during device authentication.
